snps.effect_template: BRCA1 5382insC founder mutation. Significantly elevated breast/ovarian cancer risk.
BRCA2 6174delT founder mutation. Elevated breast and ovarian cancer risk.
Common BRCA1 polymorphism. Modest effect on breast cancer risk.

recommendation_template: If carrying pathogenic variants, discuss enhanced screening (MRI, mammography) and risk reduction options with a genetic counselor.

studies.title: Average risks of breast and ovarian cancer associated with BRCA1 or BRCA2 mutations
studies.finding: BRCA1 carriers: 65% cumulative breast cancer risk by age 70
